chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.D-29 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Ferozuddin N. Shaikh, Advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G. ***** This Crl. Misc. application has been filed for transfer of investigation in Crime No.09 of 2023 registered at P.S, Bradi Jatoi- Khairpur under sections 302, 114, 148, 149 PPC read with Section 7 ATA. Learned Additional P.G has filed report along with documents and submits that the case has been challaned and the application for transfer of investigation etc. is to be entertained by the trial Court. Learned counsel for the applicant has not disputed this legal position and seeks disposal of this application on the above ground. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. application is disposed of in view of the above legal position. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
